title: discocalyx orthoneura
intro: Discocalyx orthoneura is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical forests. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Discocalyx orthoneura include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Discocalyx orthoneura are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a decoction to create teas and infusions for medicinal use.
